bookmarks.title: Omnigent — a meta-harness for building and running AI agents
bookmarks.excerpt: Omnigent is an open-source meta-harness: a common layer for composing, governing, and collaborating on AI agents — coding and otherwise — on top of the harnesses you already use.

bookmarks.title: Introducing Omnigent: A Meta-Harness to Combine, Control and Share Your Agents
bookmarks.excerpt: Omnigent is a new open source meta-harness that sits above coding tools like Claude Code, Codex, and custom agents, so you can compose, govern, and share AI agents from one place.

bookmarks.title: How Anthropic enables self-service data analytics with Claude | Claude
bookmarks.note: 前几天看到官方的一篇文章，anthropic 是如何做数据分析的，如何解决歧义，如何提供更友好的查询方式给非研发人员，最终查询精确性达到 95%，还公开了分析的 skill。
bookmarks.excerpt: Tips and approaches to maximizing Claude’s ability to drive self-serve data insights

bookmarks.title: Unlocking dependable responses with Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform’s Agentic RAG
Dreaming: Better memory for a more helpful ChatGPT
bookmarks.excerpt: ChatGPT introduces a new memory system to better remember preferences, keeping context fresh and relevant across conversations.

bookmarks.title: Best Rewind AI Alternative (Open Source) — screenpipe
bookmarks.excerpt: screenpipe is the #1 open source alternative to Rewind AI. Record your screen 24/7, search with AI, fully local and private.
